Class Furniture

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Entity
model.entity.detectable.Detectable
model.entity.detectable.Interactable
model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture
public class Furniture extends Interactable
Furnitures is an Interactable used to search the pass inside, waiting for the percentage gets to 0 before getting the item inside (action helped by the manager) and deactivate. Depending of the type they all has their own name, width, height, offsetY(in case if this type is too big) and percentage of the searching.

  • Constructor Details

    • Furniture

      public Furniture(float x, float y, int type)
      Particular part of this constructor is when it does super (since you can't initialize the datas before the super) it calls directly from the enum.
      Parameters:
      x - Position x to place the furniture
      y - Position y to place the furniture
      type - Type of furniture and depending which type has different width, height and percentual

  • Method Details

    • updatePercent

      public void updatePercent()
      Updates the percent, reducing it until it reaches 0 only if the furniture is currently getting interacted

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
